## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss ongoing website refresh project and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Elvis is leaving GrowthX; Megan will continue leading the Smith account with additional support coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Website refresh project progressing well: 12 industry pages published, 22 ready to publish this week](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Partner pages need significant improvement; prioritizing updates to these pages before city pages](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [TikTok ads performing exceptionally well with low CPL ($65) and quick conversions](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes at GrowthX

  - [Elvis announced his last week with GrowthX, moving to focus on side clients](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Megan will continue leading the Smith account](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [New support person to join in a couple of weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Website Refresh Project Progress

  - [12 industry pages published](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [22 pages edited and ready to publish this week](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Partner pages mass-updated with previously agreed changes](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Next steps: referral pages, company type pages, city pages](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Case studies to be updated last](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Partner Pages Improvement

  - [Current partner landing page lacks cohesion and proper messaging](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Sub-pages (affiliates, resellers, wholesale) need updating to include AI information](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Plan to prioritize these updates before city pages due to prominence on homepage](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Product Differentiation and Messaging

  - [Need for clearer explanation of AI Receptionist (AIR) vs. Virtual Receptionist (VR)](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a comparison page or graph showing AI vs. human involvement](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Importance of highlighting Smith.ai's support with AI prompting as a key selling point](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### Tiered Support Structure

  - [Challenges in providing full support for lower-priced plans](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Need to communicate tiered access clearly without discouraging potential high-value clients](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Research needed on how other companies (e.g., Zoom) communicate tiered access](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

### Marketing and Lead Generation

  - [TikTok ads performing exceptionally well (CPL $65 vs. normal $120-150)](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Using user-generated content (UGC) ads with creators](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Lead generation forms primary method for capturing leads](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

### Website Updates and Design

  - [Working with Aether design firm on new pages (multi-location businesses, custom instructions)](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Plans to update homepage to better reflect value propositions](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Figma designs to be shared for partner page updates](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and publish remaining industry pages this week](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Prioritize updates to partner pages and landing page](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Research and develop clearer AIR vs. VR comparison](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Investigate tiered support structure communication](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Share Figma designs for new pages with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing TikTok ad performance](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
